string.text:
Here's your «Steppe Eagle». It turned out trickier than I thought. Some kind of pistol buff showed a lot of interest, but I barely snatched it in time. Look for yourself: an expert job, it's parts are fitted with extreme precision. Heard the joke about a "pocket artillery"? Well it's not a joke, it's this thing. Oh, and that'll be 8000. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: .50 AE 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 7 => 12 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 2500 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 3.65 (+0.15) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 2.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 90 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Pistol 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +5

Here's your «Steppe Eagle». It turned out trickier than I thought. Some kind of pistol buff showed a lot of interest, but I barely snatched it in time. Look for yourself: an expert job, it's parts are fitted with extreme precision. Heard the joke about a "pocket artillery"? Well it's not a joke, it's this thing. Oh, and that'll be 8000. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: .50 AE 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 7 => 10 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 2500 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 3.65 (+0.15) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 2.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 90 m\sec. => 100 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Pistol 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +5

Look, this is SIG-Sauer P226 "Alpine".I can say without a doubt that this is a one of a kind pistol in the entire Zone! Unique model, a very limited issue commissioned only for one spec-ops unit. It was hard to get it, so I had to call in some connections that I know abroad… Increased magazine capacity and a longer barrel. All that is left is 8000 and it's yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 11.43x23 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 8 => 10 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 7000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 2.1 (+0.1) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 2.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 130 m\sec. => 156 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Yes 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Pistol 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +2 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: +20%

Look, this is SIG-Sauer P226 "Alpine".I can say without a doubt that this is a one of a kind pistol in the entire Zone! Unique model, a very limited issue commissioned only for one spec-ops unit. It was hard to get it, so I had to call in some connections that I know abroad… Increased magazine capacity and a longer barrel. All that is left is 8000 and it's yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 11.43x23 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 8 => 10 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 7000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 2.1 (+0.1) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 2.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 130 m\sec. => 156 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Yes 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Pistol 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +2 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: +20%

Lookit, this is USP 45 «Match». The pistol belonged to a mercenary called Wolfhound. A compact high-caliber shooter with short blowback and a lightened bolt. Wolfhound was one hundred percent scum, but he knew his weapons, gotta give him that. They say his favorite trick was to blow all four of his victims' limbs off and then his head - before it hit the ground. Anyway, that'll be 8000. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 11.43x23 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 12 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 7000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 2.5 (+0.05) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 2.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 140 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Yes 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Pistol

Lookit, this is USP 45 «Match». The pistol belonged to a mercenary called Wolfhound. A compact high-caliber shooter with short blowback and a lightened bolt. Wolfhound was one hundred percent scum, but he knew his weapons, gotta give him that. They say his favorite trick was to blow all four of his victims' limbs off and then his head - before it hit the ground. Anyway, that'll be 8000. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 11.43x23 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 12 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 7000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 2.5 (+0.05) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 2.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 140 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Yes 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Pistol

Here: Sub-machinegun HK MP5SD. I'll say this right now, don't judge a book by it's cover, this weapon is unmatched in close quarters combat: large caliber, great firerate and accuracy and the most important of all - low recoil! That'll be 14000 from ya. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 9x19 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 30 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 3000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 0.6 (+0.075) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 3.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 100 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1, 3, A 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: EOT, ACOG 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Integrated 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Assault

Here: Sub-machinegun HK MP5SD. I'll say this right now, don't judge a book by it's cover, this weapon is unmatched in close quarters combat: large caliber, great firerate and accuracy and the most important of all - low recoil! That'll be 14000 from ya. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 9x19 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 30 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 3000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 0.6 (+0.075) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 3.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 100 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1, 3, A 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: EOT, ACOG 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Integrated 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Assault

A perfect sample - shotgun SPAS-12 "Carabiner"! Excellent military shotgun. Got it from an ex-soldier of the foreign legion, he shortend the pump and the barrel. That'll be 14000 from ya. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 12x70 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 8 => 10 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 1000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 4.1 (+0.45) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 100 m\sec. => 120 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Shotgun 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +2 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: +20%

A perfect sample - shotgun SPAS-12 "Carabiner"! Excellent military shotgun. Got it from an ex-soldier of the foreign legion, he shortend the pump and the barrel. That'll be 14000 from ya. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 12x70 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 8 => 10 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 1000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 4.1 (+0.45) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 110 m\sec. => 130 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Shotgun 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +2 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: +20%

I think this is what you wanted. Shotgun Protecta «Street Sweeper», one of the latest developments! The entire shipment should of been sent to Central Africa, but one of my connections sent me a single sample. It's a fully automatic shotgun with increased accuracy. Hand me 14000 and it's yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 12x70 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 12 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 2000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 4.16 (+0.42) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 100 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Shotgun 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: +25%

I think this is what you wanted. Shotgun Protecta «Street Sweeper», one of the latest developments! The entire shipment should of been sent to Central Africa, but one of my connections sent me a single sample. It's a fully automatic shotgun with increased accuracy. Hand me 14000 and it's yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 12x70 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 12 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 2000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 4.16 (+0.42) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 100 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Shotgun 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: +25%

Sure. Behold OTs-14 «Storm», a submachine and grenade launcher in one. This prototype is a modified version of a conventional weapon designed for special units operating in the Zone. Technical innovation at its best from our Slavic brothers... Add 24,000 and it's yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 9x39 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 20 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 6000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 1.55 (+0.25) => 1.16 (+0.18) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 4.0 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 290 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1, A 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: PO4x34 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: Integrated 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Assault 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: +25% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: -25%

Sure. Behold OTs-14 «Storm», a submachine and grenade launcher in one. This prototype is a modified version of a conventional weapon designed for special units operating in the Zone. Technical innovation at its best from our Slavic brothers... Add 24,000 and it's yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 9x39 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 20 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 6000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 1.55 (+0.25) => 1.16 (+0.18) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 4.0 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 290 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1, A 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: PO4x34 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: Integrated 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Assault 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: +25% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: -25%

Here it is - HK G36 «Strike», a new-generation assault rifle. Accurate, reliable, and convenient with a built-in optical scope. It was previously owned by a UN observer. Their group was sent to the Zone to investigate. However, the situation turned for the worse... 24,000 and the rifle is yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 5.56x45 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 30 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 8000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 1.55 (+0.25) => 0.93 (+0.17) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 3.0 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 490 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1, 2, A 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Integrated x1.5\3.5 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Yes 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Assault 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]Dual scope%c[default] 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: +15% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: -15%

Here it is - HK G36 «Strike», a new-generation assault rifle. Accurate, reliable, and convenient with a built-in optical scope. It was previously owned by a UN observer. Their group was sent to the Zone to investigate. However, the situation turned for the worse... 24,000 and the rifle is yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 5.56x45 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 30 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 8000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 1.55 (+0.25) => 0.93 (+0.17) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 3.0 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 490 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1, 2, A 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Integrated x1.5\3.5 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Yes 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Assault 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]Dual scope%c[default] 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: +15% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: -15%

Just a sec. Here's a modular FN F2000 «Stinger» rifle, the brainchild of Belgian gunmakers. Accurate, all-purpose, handy for both righties and lefties, comes with an optical scope and a grenade launcher. I got it from some unlucky UN observers... That'll be 24,000 extra. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 5.56x45 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 30 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 7000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 0.8 (+0.3) => 0.68 (+0.25) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 5.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 450 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1, A 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Integrated x3\Iron Sight 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: Integrated 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Yes 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Assault 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]Dual scope%c[default] 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: +15% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: -15%

Just a sec. Here's a modular FN F2000 «Stinger» rifle, the brainchild of Belgian gunmakers. Accurate, all-purpose, handy for both righties and lefties, comes with an optical scope and a grenade launcher. I got it from some unlucky UN observers... That'll be 24,000 extra. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 5.56x45 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 30 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 7000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 0.8 (+0.3) => 0.68 (+0.25) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 5.1 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 450 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1, A 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Integrated x3\Iron Sight 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: Integrated 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Yes 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Assault 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]Dual scope%c[default] 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Accuracy: +15% 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: -15%

Here - VSS "Tide". Overall it's the same as your average Vintorez but this has increased capacity and uses lighter parts. It belonged to a mercenary once, before he sold it. This'll be yours for 28000. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 9x39 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 10 => 20 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 2000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 0.4 (+0.3) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 4.2 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 240 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1, A 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Integrated x4 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Integrated 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Sniper Rifle 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]Dual scope when PSO-1 installed.%c[default] 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +10

Here - VSS "Tide". Overall it's the same as your average Vintorez but this has increased capacity and uses lighter parts. It belonged to a mercenary once, before he sold it. This'll be yours for 28000. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 9x39 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 10 => 20 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 2000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 0.4 (+0.3) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 4.2 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 240 m\sec. 
 
***********************

%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Integrated x4 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Integrated 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Sniper Rifle 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]Dual scope when PSO-1 installed.%c[default] 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +10

Here. This is an SVU-A2, a short sniper rifle with an increased capacity and long barrel. I bought it off Max, the legendary Freedom guard. He swore there are no others like it in the whole Zone. It's an exclusive item, at least in these parts. It'll be 28,000 extra. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 7.62x54 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 10 => 13 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 2000 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 2.1 (+0.45) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 4.0 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 430 m\sec. => 495 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: A, 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Kobra, PSO-1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Sniper Rifle 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +3 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: +15%

Here. This is an SVU-A2, a short sniper rifle with an increased capacity and long barrel. I bought it off Max, the legendary Freedom guard. He swore there are no others like it in the whole Zone. It's an exclusive item, at least in these parts. It'll be 28,000 extra.

Of course. Here, take a look - SVD "Lynx".Hand crafted by a local specialist, bless his soul, so there won't be another one like this. Extended magazine capacity and a longer barrel. 28000 and this one's yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 7.62x54 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 10 => 13 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 2500 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 2.5 (+0.45) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 4.2 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 430 m\sec. => 495 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Integrated x5 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No

Of course. Here, take a look - SVD "Lynx".Hand crafted by a local specialist, bless his soul, so there won't be another one like this. Extended magazine capacity and a longer barrel. 28000 and this one's yours. 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 7.62x54 mm. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 10 => 13

%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Integrated x5 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Yes 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Sniper Rifle 
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: +3 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: +15%
A pistol.
Of course. It'll be 10,000, of which I will require an advance payment of 2000.
You're not a very reliable customer, so the pistol will cost you 12,000. And I will require an advance payment of 4000.
I'm afraid the best pistols have already sold out. If you want the regular stuff, Owl's the man to see.
A close-range weapon.
Sure thing. The price is 18,000, and I'll need 4000 of that in advance.
You refused to pick up your last order... So this one will cost you 22,000, and I'll need 8000 of that in advance.
Hrm... You know, I probably can't help you there. The demand is too high.
An assault weapon.
Something high-caliber and with rapid fire capability, okay... The regular price is 30,000, with a 6000 advance payment. What do you say?
You're a tough customer. I'll have to charge you 36,000 and I need 12,000 paid in advance. Deal?
Right now is a bad time... the military are making things hot at the Cordon. Someone attacked their outpost the other day, which made them even more difficult to deal with.
A sniper weapon.
For you I can get the best for only 35,000, but you'll have to pay me 7000 in advance.
Working with you entails a certain amount of risk... I can try to arrange your order for 42,000, but you'll need to make a 14,000 down payment.
Sorry, this type of weapon is hard to come by right now. My contact for sniper stuff is... let's say he's indisposed.
[SPECIAL WEAPON]
Yeah, I have some intresting bits and pieces, take a look, maybe you'll find something that catches your eye.

Good choice: silent, decent caliber, low recoil. Firerate isn't all that fast and the distance's no match for a Barrett but... Who needs that when a single round can go clean through an exoskeleton? But remember, the ammunition's expensive and fairly rare. That'll be 60,000 and you can get it right now.
 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Caliber: 12.7x54 mm 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Mag Size: 5 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Max Wear: 800 shots 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Recoil: 0.5 (+0.0) 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Reload time: 3.2 sec. 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Bullet Speed: 250 m\sec. 
 
*********************** 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire modes: 1 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Scopes: Integrated x10 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Grenade Launcher: No 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Support silencer: Integrated 
%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Specialization: Sniper Rifle
One shot - One kill. I take it.
I'll think about it.

Curious li'l thing - personally overlooked the process of its construction by a local expert. After I saw her in action I realized what was what. I'll give it to you for 45,000, you will not regret it, especially since this model was created by the expert himself, before he got fried in an accident when he dropped the ammunition for it... Now I want to sell this dangerous thing as fast as I can. \n%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Damage radius: 14m \n%c[255,1,255,255]• %c[default]Fire distance: 120m
Beat weakly, but over a large area. Think I will take it.
Maybe next time.

This thing? Well it's not really for sale, I got it only recently, was looking over it... Well,actually, this is a remote controller of some autonomous rocket silo somewhere in the center of the Zone. Sounds exciting doesn't it? Yeah...Except you need the activation codes, and where to get them... Noone I know could get through the firing locks, and even if this works - connection still online, there is no guarantee that the silo itself is not in ruins. Honestly, I don't really need it, so I can give it to you like a souvenier, for a symbolic price of 10,000.
Someday I'll have more of these but for now, I'll enjoy this one. Hand it over.
Not sure that I'll need this right now.
I'm not interested in any of this.
